title: Kenya accelerator cohort screening
prompt: An accelerator has 80 SME applicants in Kenya and wants to pick the 20 most fundable companies. How should an AI agent screen them?
bad_agent_pattern: Ignore missing registration or transaction evidence
mvr_aware_pattern: Separate claimed traction from verified evidence
Check formal, informal, sentiment, context, and freshness coverage
Ask for missing proof before ranking
Use readiness tiers instead of credit-like scores
